lead_paragraph: Data Analyst & AI Automation Specialist based in Kerala, India, building Power BI dashboards, SQL analytics, and AI-driven workflow automation for businesses across India and the GCC.
about_paragraph_1: I started in flight-pricing analytics at Dyninno, working inside GDS systems like Apollo and Galileo to make sense of fare data at scale. That's where I learned that good analysis only matters if someone can act on it fast.
about_paragraph_2: That belief led me to found Sahivox, an AI automation and digital services agency where I build chatbots, workflow automations, and BI dashboards for small businesses — closing the gap between "we have data" and "we made a decision."
about_paragraph_3: I recently completed my MSc in Computer Science and I'm currently finishing my PL-300 Power BI certification, sharpening the analytics side while I keep shipping automation work on the side.
